Alzheimer's Microbial Data Center. The Center will provide a central location for 
all Alzheimer's disease research, including the development of new diagnostic 
test methods, the development of new therapeutics, and the development of 
new diagnostic tools. The Center will also provide a central location for the 
coordination of the activities of the various research groups within the Alzheimer's 
Association.

Skip to content work CV imprint contact workshops for children

The CV imprint workshop for children is now available.  The workshop is
for children aged 5-8 years and is run by the CV imprint team.  The
workshop is free of charge and takes place on Thursday, November
13th from 2:00 - 3:00 p.m. at the Enron Building Conference Room.

The workshop will be led by the CV imprint team and will be
attended by Enron employees and their families.  The workshop will
include a brief overview of the CV imprint process, a brief
discussion of the benefits of the CV imprint process, and a brief
discussion of the CV imprint process for children.  The workshop will
end with a brief Q&A session.

If you are interested in attending the workshop, please RSVP to Stephanie Sever at
stephanie.sever@enron.com no later than Friday, November 12th.  If you have any
questions, please contact Stephanie Sever at Stephanie.Sever@enron.com.

If you have any questions regarding the workshop, please contact the CV imprint team at
stephanie.sever@enron.com.

Thank you for your participation in this important

I am not sure if you have received this, but I wanted to let you know that I have been selected to participate in the Enron Corp. Employee Referral Program.  I am very excited about this opportunity and I look forward to meeting with you and your team.  I will be in Houston on Monday, February 27, from 10:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m.  Please feel free to call me at x35290 if you have any questions.

Sincerely,

Louise Kitchen
Manager, Employee Referral
Enron Corp.

Contact Donations ANBI Safeguarding Policy 2.0

Dear ANBI Community,

We are pleased to announce the ANBI Safeguarding Policy 2.0.  This
policy is designed to help ensure that ANBI's financial transactions
are conducted in accordance with ANBI's policies and procedures.  The
policy is designed to address ANBI's risk management responsibilities
and to provide a framework for ANBI's internal controls.  The policy
is available on the ANBI website at:

http://www.anb.com/corp/corp_policy.html

The ANBI Safeguarding Policy is a work in progress and we welcome your
comments.  Please send your comments to:

Sara Shackleton
Enron North America Corp.
1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a
Houston, Texas  77002
713-853-5620 (phone)
713-646-3490 (fax)
sara.shackleton@enron.com

prompt: chambers, with this note: “Gratefully and Respectfully Reserved for Dave
generation:
chambers, with this note: “Greetings from the Enron 
Office of the Chairman.

I am pleased to announce that we have appointed John Sherriff as the new 
Chairman and CEO of Enron Global Markets.  John has been with Enron 
since 1996 and most recently served as President and CEO of Enron 
Energy Services.  John brings a wealth of experience and a proven ability to 
lead and motivate people.  He will be based in Houston and will report to 
the Office of the Chairman.  In addition, John will be responsible for 
the day-to-day management of Enron's wholesale energy businesses.  

John will be joining Enron in his new role on July 1.  Please join me in congratulating 
John on his new role.

Sincerely,

Jeff

contact mss@lib.cam.ac.uk

The University of Cambridge is one of the world's leading research
universities. We are ranked in the top 100 of the Times Higher
Edition's World University Rankings, and in the top 10 in Europe
and North America. We have a strong reputation for attracting the
best and brightest students from around the world, and for
providing them with a world-class education.

We are looking for a new Vice-Chancellor to lead our
academic and research activities. The successful candidate will
lead our efforts to develop and implement our strategic
plan, and to ensure that we continue to attract the best and
brightest students from around the world to Cambridge.

The successful candidate will be responsible for the strategic direction
of the University, and will be responsible for the overall management
of the University's academic and research activities.

The Vice-Chancellor will report to the President of the University, and will
report to the Board of Trustees.

The University of Cambridge is committed to recruiting and retaining the
best and brightest students from around the world. We are
looking for a candidate who will continue to attract the best and
brightest students from around the world to Cambridge.

journey through Tarangire National Park, the largest intact tropical rainforest in the world.

The trip will include a visit to the world famous Tarangire Falls, a visit to the world famous Kintyre National Park, and a visit to the world famous Kintyre Beach.

The trip will be departing from Sydney on the 7th of November and returning on the 10th of November.

The cost of the trip is $2,500.

Please let me know if you are interested in this trip.

Thanks,

Kay

prompt: until very recently, that handling payments was exclusively handled by
generation:
until very recently, that handling payments was exclusively handled by the 
counterparty. 

The new system will allow us to handle payments for the entire group, 
including the counterparty. 

The new system will also allow us to handle the risk of the group's 
transactions. 

The new system will be implemented in stages.  The first stage will be 
implemented in the next few weeks.  The second stage will be implemented 
in the next few months.  The third stage will be implemented in the 
next few years. 

The new system will be fully operational by the end of 2001. 

Please join me in congratulating the entire group on this significant change. 

Thank you.

Regards,

Rajnish

We are pleased to announce that we have appointed John Sherriff as our new 
Chief Operating Officer.  John has been with Enron for over 15 years and 
has been responsible for the development of Enron's wholesale and 
retail businesses.  John will be responsible for the day-to-day operations 
of Enron's wholesale businesses, including the development and execution of 
strategic business plans, the development and execution of new business 
opportunities, and the development and execution of new business relationships.  
John will also be responsible for the overall management of Enron's retail 
business.  John will report to the Office of the Chairman.
